reviews.review_description: Okay I think this game is cool just a little bit, but I cannot express how many times this game has made me hit my headset with my controllers. The 404 target you even if there's like 50 of your teammates shooting em. When you swing with a sword it sometimes glitches and doesn't kill the enemy. When you use the Oculus/Meta menu or pause the game and go back into the game, you fall out the map and the entire game glitches making you have to restart it. Back when i played HAX for the first time, there was no arguments against this game. Now there are many arguments against this game. I would give 5 stars, but the bugs and the targeting is making me give 1 star. I hope you people find my review and fix all of the bugs i have reasoned in this review. Thank you for your time.

it is such a fun game, and i love the mechanics also really happy the full game came out but i deleted the demo for space and i wanna redownload it but i cant find it on the game store, so please fix that

developer_response.body: So glad you liked the Demo! We have removed access to the demo since the full game is out now. You can "demo" HAX using the Try Before You Buy feature. If you still want to play the original Demo, head over to our HAX Discord Server and message Davy. Cheers!

reviews.review_description: Honestly very good built game perfect to pass to time the real game has finally came out but the demo is just as good
for those who don’t know, the game is now officially out for 25$ on the quest store. Go get it!

The only complaint I have is that you can't disable turning because my controllers have stick drift.i can move just fine but I can't stop turning  because of stick drift.also I think you should add a mode called siege defence.where you would be in a base that is being siege by the enemy team (404 I think)and you would have to defend it.also add a mode called siege where your attacking instead of defending

Really fun game, overall it's extremely fun to play, even in the single player match with only one map. I'm really excited for the new features and multi player to be released. I'll be checking constantly!
It's good but add multiplayer pleasessssss
This is a great game one thing that it really does need is the ability to play setting down instead of having to stand up I know it's lazy thing but most games have some kind of height adjustment.

This game is perfect so much fun leveling up the guns but I suggest in the actual game when it’s fully published add snipers please but other than that this game is all out super fun to play i highly recommend it

reviews.review_title: Why is this just a demo?!
reviews.review_description: I love hax so much! The guns are sick the graphics portray a robot sci fi theme which very well with the game. I would love it if hax came out as a full game with additional guns and melee weapons but overall best demo I’ve ever played😄

reviews.review_title: This is like a sopshicated Gun Raiders.
reviews.review_description: It has a similar, but better look, unique to itself. The ability of this game to rock it's own aesethic with confidence is like how Boneworks confidentally presents it's own visuals. And holy hell, the ultra crisp rendering in this game really makes it shine. Other than that, everything works well. It's entering a crowded field, but Hax is a very confident showing.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much! We spent a lot of time at the beginning of development figuring out what was needed to produce the best graphics possible, good to hear it was worth it! We're hard at work on multiplayer, and will have more information regarding that soon!

reviews.review_title: Fun, but no controller based direction
reviews.review_description: Game is fun, but be aware that it has no controller based direction option if you get motion sick from head based.  The only smooth loco direction options are head based or roomspace based direction.  As much as I could play before motion sickness crept in, it has good gunplay and nice levels.  If it ever gets the standard loco options, I'd like to play more.

I hate the fact I can't just spawn and use swords specialty in a custom game with bots! I feel the guns and aiming needs work. Pavlov to me has the best gun play. I like the look of the game feels like gun raiders. Over all not horrible I think it will get better over time

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing and for the feedback. We would love to add many features including more customization for games, but our main priority right now is multiplayer.

reviews.review_description:
omg! this game is awesome. graphic style is masterpiece. gameplay is simple and gives a lot of fun.
i can’t wait for the full game. 
adding a player height in settings will be a nice touch. i’m 183 cm tall, and the robots look little tiny 😅

One of the best games I have played from app lab. The graphics are great, the controls are great and I love the innovation of the magazine system working as grenades and melee weapons. Can't wait for the full game and multiplayer
H.A.X.  Yes!      Love the multiple use of the clip.     H.A.X. is looking to be a good game.

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing! Good to hear you enjoyed it so far. Be on the look out for an update coming soon that will let you play on a new map!

reviews.review_description: great game, a lot of potential.  The question is whether developers will be able to improve performance in quest 1.

developer_response.body: Thank you! So we will be able to optimize it a bit further, but the new map is a little heavy for Quest 1. We are working on our level design pipeline to ensure that all future maps will be much more performance-friendly in general so we won't have that issue anymore.

reviews.review_description: Does not want to download
Great Game! waiting for the full release, it's very simple but yet very fun and well made! Congratulations to the dev team!

reviews.review_title: Great shooter with lots of potential
reviews.review_description: I’ve only about played 2hrs and I haven’t seen a better looking game on the quest 2. Also the weapons don’t feel clunky and weird, just that ammo box thing gets in my way. I know you can adjust it but I would really like to see it on my sides like in a lot of the other vr shooters. Also in the new map there’s this weird screen flicker that happens, but hey, it’s the beta. I really hope to see more content in the future, especially pvp.
